preprocessing: resize to 128x128, divide by 255 (no further normalisation)
note: Binary Human-vs-AI classifier (3-conv CNN, 32/64/64 filters + dense 128). Trained on a ~30,000-image subset of Hemg/AI-Generated-vs-Real-Images-Datasets (HuggingFace); Human=label 0, AI=label 1. Held-out validation accuracy: 0.938. A separate fuller model described on this page reaches 93.71% on the original 270k-image 47-category dataset — the in-browser demo intentionally uses a smaller, faster variant.
